ddls:
CREATE TABLE "city_tiers" (
  "city_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city tier */,
  "city_tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the city tier (e.g., Tier 1, Tier 2) */,
  "city_tier_description" TEXT /* Description of the city tier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Level0, Level1) */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utm_mediums" (
  "utm_medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UTM medium */,
  "utm_medium_name" TEXT /* Name of the UTM medium (e.g., Level0, Level11) */,
  "utm_medium_description" TEXT /* Description of the UTM medium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utm_medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utm_sources" (
  "utm_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UTM source */,
  "utm_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the UTM source (e.g., Level0, Level2, others) */,
  "utm_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the UTM source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utm_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_drops" (
  "lead_drop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead drop event */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "drop_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the lead drop */,
  "drop_date" TEXT /* Date and time the lead was dropped */,
  "drop_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the lead drop */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_drop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referred_leads" (
  "referred_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referred lead */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "referral_source" TEXT /* Source of the referral */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date and time the lead was referred */,
  "referral_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referred_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_completions" (
  "app_completion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application completion */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date and time the application was completed */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., submitted, pending, accepted) */,
  "completion_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the application completion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_completion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistance_interactions" (
  "assistance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assistance interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the assistance interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of assistance provided (e.g., technical support, course advice) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the assistance */,
  "assistant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assistant who provided the assistance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assistance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assistance_interactions_assistant_id FOREIGN KEY ("assistant_id") REFERENCES assistants ("assistant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_interactions" (
  "career_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the career interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of career interaction (e.g., job placement, career counseling) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the career interaction */,
  "career_advisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the career advisor who provided the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_career_interactions_career_advisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("career_advisor_id") REFERENCES career_advisors ("career_advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_interactions" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the payment interaction */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_interactions" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the social interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of social interaction (e.g., social media post, live chat) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the social interaction */,
  "social_channel" TEXT /* Social media channel used for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "syllabus_interactions" (
  "syllabus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each syllabus interaction */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the syllabus interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of syllabus interaction (e.g., syllabus request, syllabus review) */,
  "interaction_notes" TEXT /* Notes or details of the syllabus interaction */,
  "syllabus_version" TEXT /* Version of the syllabus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("syllabus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_channels" (
  "marketing_channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing channel */,
  "marketing_channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing channel */,
  "marketing_channel_description" TEXT /* Description of the marketing channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketing_channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lead_sources" (
  "lead_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lead source */,
  "lead_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the lead source */,
  "lead_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the lead source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lead_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assistants" (
  "assistant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assistant */,
  "assistant_name" TEXT /* Name of the assistant */,
  "assistant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the assistant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assistant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "career_advisors" (
  "career_advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each career advisor */,
  "career_advisor_name" TEXT /* Name of the career advisor */,
  "career_advisor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the career advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("career_advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being versioned */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
